opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My scalp is on fire and I can't stop scratching it until it bleeds. I used a new shampoo and I'm terrified my hair is going to fall out from infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The itching and burning suddenly got much worse over the last day and I've been scratching until it bleeds — I'm scared it's turned into an infection and I need something for it tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: I've had dandruff-like flaking with a bit of redness at my hairline for a long time, but the burning and itching flared up badly in the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: the bad flare has been about a day
symptom_narrative.character: intense itching and a burning, stinging feeling, and now it stings constantly where I've scratched
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really distracting — I can't stop thinking about it and keep reaching up to scratch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of my scalp along the hairline, and it goes a little onto my forehead
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse when I think about it and after I scratch
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: scratching, and I think the new shampoo made it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: some little scabs where I scratched and it bled; I don't feel unwell otherwise
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flaky, slightly red patches on my scalp on and off, but never this sore before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing everything as normal, just really distracted by how much it itches and burns

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've had a flaky, itchy scalp on and off for years
past_medical_history.how_managed: I just use anti-dandruff shampoos from the chemist

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've been trying different anti-dandruff and other shampoos to fix the flaking

objective_data_offered.value: you can see flaky silvery-white patches along the front of my hairline with some thicker scale, and a few small dark scabs where I scratched and it bled
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-held phone camera in home lighting — colour and fine detail may not be accurate

objective_data_offered.value: the redness seems to stay on the flaky patches, I can't see it spreading out onto normal skin, and there's no yellow weeping or pus that I can see
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-assessment of spread and discharge; cannot substitute for an in-person skin examination

objective_data_offered.value: I feel normal temperature-wise, no fever or chills
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation, not measured on a thermometer
